heading: Notice of classification and enforcement action
label: 4618 Notice of classification and enforcement action

children.heading: Notice
children.label: a Notice
children.text: Before taking any action referred to in subsection (b), the Director shall provide to the regulated entity written notice of the proposed action, which states the reasons for the proposed action and the information on which the proposed action is based.
Classification or reclassification of a regulated entity within a particular capital classification under .section 4614 of this title
Any discretionary supervisory action pursuant to .section 4615 of this title
Any discretionary supervisory action pursuant to except a decision to appoint a conservator under section 4616(b)(6) of this title.section 4616 of this title1See References in Text note below.1

children.heading: In general
children.label: 1 In general
children.text: During the 30-day period beginning on the date that a regulated entity is provided notice under subsection (a) of a proposed action, the regulated entity may submit to the Director any information relevant to the action that the regulated entity considers appropriate for consideration by the Director in determining whether to take such action. The Director may, at the discretion of the Director, hold an informal administrative hearing to receive and discuss such information and the proposed determination.

children.heading: Extended period
children.label: 2 Extended period
children.text: The Director may extend the period under paragraph (1) for good cause for not more than 30 additional days.

children.heading: Shortened period
children.label: 3 Shortened period
children.text: The Director may shorten the period under paragraph (1) if the Director determines that the condition of the regulated entity so requires or the regulated entity consents.

children.heading: Failure to respond
children.label: 4 Failure to respond
children.text: The failure of a regulated entity to provide information during the response period under this subsection (as extended or shortened) shall waive any right of the regulated entity to comment on the proposed action of the Director.

children.heading: Consideration of information and determination
children.label: d Consideration of information and determination
children.text: After the expiration of the response period under subsection (c) or upon receipt of information provided during such period by the regulated entity, whichever occurs earlier, the Director shall determine whether to take the action proposed, taking into consideration any relevant information submitted by the regulated entity during the response period. The Director shall provide written notice of a determination to take action and the reasons for such determination to the regulated entity, the Committee on Banking, Finance and Urban Affairs of the House of Representatives, and the Committee on Banking, Housing, and Urban Affairs of the Senate. Such notice shall respond to any information submitted during the response period.

children.heading: Effective date of actions
children.label: e Effective date of actions
children.text: An action referred to in subsection (b) shall take effect upon receipt by the regulated entity of notice of the determination of the Director under subsection (d), unless otherwise provided in such notice.
